name: Falling Into You
overview: Duan Yucheng, a passionate high jumper, struggles with his height but finds guidance from coach Luo Na. Determined to succeed, he joins her university team, facing injuries, failures, and doubt along the way. As he competes from school-level to national championships, he pushes through every challenge, finding joy in his progress. Through it all, the track remains his greatest passion and driving force.

trailers.title: Trailer Con Đường Rực Lửa | Kim Thần, Vương An Vũ nhiệt huyết thanh xuân rực cháy trời thu | YOUKU
